## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes (strict)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Layering respected — `core`/`backends` do not import `ui` or Qt
- [ ] `PROGRESS.md` updated if this closes a roadmap item
- [ ] An ADR was added under `docs/adr/` if this makes an architectural decision
